backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the payroll backend with wage entry CRUD operations, lohnsteuer management, default entry seeding, and a payroll summary calculation function.
backend/migration.mo: Motoko migration module that upgrades actor state from the old schema to the new schema by adding the `seedDefaultWages` boolean field.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the auto-seeding of 6 default wage entries on initial load, linking the feature to its implementing frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short descriptions summarizing each file's role in the wage calculator application.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up React Query, renders the app layout (header, WageCalculator page, footer), and provides a Sonner toast container.
frontend/src/components/PayrollSummary.t: React component displaying a German payroll summary card with 9 computed values, an editable Lohnsteuer input with save functionality, loading skeletons, and deductions highlighted in red.
frontend/src/components/WageEntryForm.ts: Form component for creating or editing wage entries with field validation, live Betrag preview, Pauschalbetrag toggle, and submission via the addOrUpdateWageEntry mutation.
frontend/src/components/WageEntryTable.t: Renders a table of wage entries with edit and delete actions, showing columns for wage type, description, quantity, rate, surcharge, tax/SV/GB flags, and amount, plus a totals footer row.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context backed by DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks and mutations for all backend operations: fetching/adding/updating/deleting wage entries, retrieving the payroll summary, and getting/setting Lohnsteuer, plus a utility to calculate Betrag.
frontend/src/hooks/useSeedDefaultEntries: Thin wrapper around useGetAllWageEntries that exposes seeding state (isSeeding, seedError, isSeeded) to indicate whether default wage entries have been loaded from the backend.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a comprehensive set of CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes covering colors, table styles, and UI component tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/WageCalculator.tsx: Main page component that orchestrates the wage calculator UI, managing form visibility and the selected entry for editing, and composing WageEntryForm, WageEntryTable, and PayrollSummary.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, secondary, sidebar, chart, semantic table colors, emerald accent), border radius, box shadows, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the Lohnabrechnung (German payroll) app, tracking schema version, existing features (auto-seeding 6 default wage entries on first load totaling 4,785.89 € Brutto), and a pending feature request to pre-fill the input form with those same default Lohnarten.
